game_info.title: make-game-vertical
game_info.concept:
Why have friends if not to play Golf... With Your Friends! Nothing is out of bounds as you take on courses filled with fast paced, exciting, simultaneous mini golf for up to 12 players!

INTRODUCING: KING OF THE CASTLE


Join the Discord Community


About the Game

Why have friends if not to play Golf... With Your Friends! Nothing is out of bounds as you take on courses filled with fast paced, exciting, simultaneous mini golf for up to 12 players!

Key Features:

12 Player Multiplayer! Make sure your skills are up to scratch as you tee off against 11 other golfers in simultaneous online multiplayer.

Themed Courses! Go head to head on courses with unique mechanics and holes. Become a pro in the pirate course, aim for an albatross in the ancient theme or wage all out Worm warfare in the Worms course!

Powerups! Drive a wedge between your friends as you trap their ball in honey, freeze it or turn it into a cube.

Three Game Modes! Tee off in classic mini golf, shoot for the pars in hoops or swap the hole for a goal in hockey

Level Editor! Putt your own spin on the game by creating, sharing and playing your own courses.

Customisations! Turn the fairway into the runway, with unlockable hats, skins and trails for your ball.
game_info.description: Mini Golf Madness! Navigate your ball through a challenging course filled with obstacles, ramps, and hazards. Your goal is to sink the ball into the hole in as few strokes as possible while avoiding water hazards and out-of-bounds areas. Complete all 3 holes to win the game!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Aim your shot (rotate the power indicator)
Space: Hold to charge power, release to shoot
Shift: Toggle camera zoom (when ball is moving)
Z: Quick restart current hole

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic ball physics and hole completion. Verifying that the ball can be shot, moves according to physics, and successfully enters the hole when close enough.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Aim directly at the hole and shoot with moderate power. Adjust aim based on ball position after each shot. Continue until the ball enters the hole.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The ball should move smoothly, respond to collisions with walls, and successfully complete the hole when it reaches the target. Test is successful when the first hole is completed.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing full game completion with optimal play. Verifying that all three holes can be completed in sequence and the win condition triggers correctly.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use calculated optimal angles and power levels to complete each hole efficiently. Adjust for obstacles and aim for the shortest path to each hole.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all three holes, triggering the "GAME_OVER_WIN" state. The game should track strokes accurately and display the final score.
